templates.title: Dramatic Character Reveal with Emotional Impact
templates.description: A cinematic sequence revealing a character with powerful emotional resonance

prompt.main: Slow dolly zoom starting from extreme close-up of tearful eyes, gradually pulling back to reveal a solitary figure standing on rain-soaked city rooftop at twilight. Neon signs reflect in puddles as camera circles the subject. Deep shadows contrast with warm streetlight glow, creating film noir atmosphere with modern urban setting. Subject's coat billows in wind as they gaze at sprawling metropolis below.

elements.cameraMovement: Slow dolly zoom out transitioning to circular tracking shot
elements.subject: Solitary figure in long coat, emotional expression visible
elements.scene: Urban rooftop at twilight, rain-soaked surfaces, city skyline
elements.motion: Coat billowing, rain falling, neon signs flickering
elements.lighting: Film noir style - high contrast, warm streetlights vs cool shadows
elements.style: Cinematic film noir with modern urban elements

bestPractices: Focus on subtle facial expressions during close-up
Time the reveal with emotional music cues
Use depth of field to isolate subject from background

examples.sampleOutput: Opening scene of a thriller or drama film

templates.title: High-Octane Chase Sequence Through Urban Environment
templates.description: Dynamic action sequence with multiple camera angles and intense movement

prompt.main: Handheld camera follows protagonist sprinting through narrow alleyway, quick cut to overhead drone shot revealing pursuer gaining ground. Camera mounted on vehicle as it screeches around corner, sparks flying from scraping metal. Low angle tracking shot as subject parkours over obstacles, camera whip pans to capture each movement. Adrenaline-pumping sequence with rapid cuts and dynamic angles.

elements.cameraMovement: Handheld tracking, drone overhead, vehicle-mounted, whip pans
elements.subject: Runner in athletic gear performing parkour moves
elements.scene: Urban alleyways, market streets, rooftops, industrial area
elements.motion: Sprint, jump, slide, climb - continuous high-energy movement
elements.lighting: High contrast daylight, shadows in alleyways
elements.style: Action movie cinematography - Paul Greengrass style

bestPractices: Maintain screen direction consistency
Use motion blur strategically for speed sensation
Match cuts on action for seamless flow

templates.title: Intimate Romantic Scene with Soft Cinematography
templates.description: Tender moment between two characters with dreamy visuals

prompt.main: Steadicam glides through field of wildflowers at golden hour, revealing couple in soft focus. Camera slowly pushes in as they embrace, lens flare creates ethereal glow. Shallow depth of field with foreground flowers creating natural vignette. Gentle breeze moves hair and fabric, creating organic movement. Warm color grading emphasizes romantic atmosphere.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth steadicam approach with gentle push-in
elements.subject: Couple in embrace, soft romantic interaction
elements.scene: Wildflower meadow at golden hour, dreamy landscape
elements.motion: Hair and clothing in breeze, natural swaying of flowers
elements.lighting: Golden hour backlight, soft fill, lens flares
elements.style: Terrence Malick inspired - natural light and movement

modifiedElements.scene: City bridge at sunset, bokeh lights

bestPractices: Use soft focus and shallow depth of field
Capture natural moments between takes
Emphasize warm color tones in grading

templates.title: Suspenseful Corridor Scene with Shadow Play
templates.description: Tense thriller sequence using lighting and camera work to build suspense

prompt.main: Camera tracks backwards down dimly lit hospital corridor, fluorescent lights flickering intermittently. Figure emerges from shadows at far end, silhouette distorted by failing lights. Dutch angle increases tension as subject approaches. Quick cuts between empty rooms glimpsed through doorways. Sound of footsteps echoes, growing louder. Final frame - extreme close-up of door handle slowly turning.

elements.cameraMovement: Backwards tracking, Dutch angles, quick pans to doorways
elements.subject: Mysterious figure in silhouette, slow deliberate movement
elements.scene: Abandoned hospital corridor, flickering lights, multiple doorways
elements.motion: Slow approach, lights flickering, shadows shifting
elements.lighting: Low key lighting, flickering fluorescents, deep shadows

modifiedElements.lighting: Harsh daylight through windows creating sharp shadows
modifiedElements.atmosphere: Unsettling contrast of danger in daylight

bestPractices: Build tension through pacing and rhythm
Use negative space to create unease
Sound design is crucial for atmosphere

templates.title: Epic Landscape Reveal with Heroic Framing
templates.description: Sweeping vista shot revealing breathtaking landscape and lone hero

prompt.main: Drone ascending from behind cliff edge, revealing vast mountain range bathed in sunrise. Lone figure stands on precipice, silhouetted against glowing sky. Camera continues rising and pulling back to show scale of landscape. Mist rolls through valleys below, eagles circle in distance. Epic orchestral score timing with reveal. Hero's cape flows in mountain wind.

elements.cameraMovement: Drone ascent from low to high, pulling back for scale
elements.subject: Heroic figure on mountain precipice, cape flowing
elements.scene: Majestic mountain range at sunrise, misty valleys
elements.motion: Cape billowing, mist rolling, eagles circling
elements.lighting: Sunrise backlighting, rim light on hero, atmospheric haze
elements.style: Lord of the Rings cinematography style

modifiedElements.scene: Vast desert dunes with sandstorm approaching
modifiedElements.lighting: Harsh desert sun, sand particles in air

bestPractices: Time reveal with musical crescendo
Use atmospheric elements for depth
Frame hero small against vast landscape

templates.title: Intense Two-Person Dialogue with Dynamic Coverage
templates.description: Dramatic conversation scene with sophisticated camera work

prompt.main: Over-shoulder medium shot establishes tense conversation in dimly lit bar. Camera slowly pushes in during emotional revelation. Cut to tight close-up on eyes during pivotal moment. Handheld camera adds tension as argument escalates. Pull focus between speakers to guide attention. Background bar patrons in soft focus. Practical lighting from neon signs creates color contrast on faces.

elements.cameraMovement: Slow push-ins, over-shoulder coverage, handheld for tension
elements.subject: Two people in heated discussion, expressive faces
elements.scene: Moody bar interior, booth seating, neon lighting
elements.motion: Subtle hand gestures, leaning in/pulling back, focus pulls
elements.lighting: Practical neon lights, moody low-key lighting

bestPractices: Match eyelines precisely between shots
Use focus pulls to shift dramatic emphasis
Let performance drive camera movement

templates.title: Dreamlike Flashback Sequence with Time Transition
templates.description: Smooth transition from present to past with visual effects

prompt.main: Close-up on character's eyes, pupils dilating as memory triggers. Smooth dolly combined with zoom creates vertigo effect. Scene dissolves into swirling particles that reform as past location. Younger version of character appears through time ripple effect. Colors desaturate slightly, film grain added for period feel. Camera movements become more fluid and dreamlike. Edges of frame blur creating memory vignette.

elements.cameraMovement: Dolly zoom, floating steadicam, gentle swirls
elements.subject: Character transitioning from present to past self
elements.scene: Modern location morphing into period setting
elements.motion: Particle effects, time ripples, smooth transitions
elements.lighting: Soft, diffused light with slight overexposure

bestPractices: Use consistent visual motifs for time periods
Sound design crucial for transition
Color grade to differentiate timelines

templates.title: Intense Battle Sequence with Handheld Chaos
templates.description: Visceral combat scene with immersive camera work

prompt.main: Handheld camera in midst of battlefield, dirt and debris flying past lens. Quick whip pans between explosions and soldiers. Low angle following soldier through smoke-filled trench. Shaky cam intensifies during mortar impacts. Brief moments of slow-motion for emotional beats. Mud splatters on lens adding authenticity. Final crane shot rises above chaos revealing scale of battle.

elements.cameraMovement: Intense handheld, whip pans, crane reveal
elements.subject: Soldiers in combat, explosions, battlefield chaos
elements.scene: WWI-style trenches, no man's land, smoke and fire
elements.lighting: Overcast sky, muzzle flashes, explosion lighting
elements.style: Saving Private Ryan beach landing style

modifiedElements.scene: Urban environment, building to building combat
modifiedElements.style: Black Hawk Down street battle style

bestPractices: Vary shot lengths to control pacing
Use practical effects when possible
Balance chaos with geographical clarity

templates.title: Stylized Heist Planning Montage
templates.description: Quick-cut montage showing elaborate heist preparation

prompt.main: Split screen showing blueprint overlays on real location. Quick cuts between team members preparing - lock picking, surveillance setup, vehicle prep. Overhead shot of table with plans, photos, and tools. Time-lapse of wall covered in evidence photos connected by string. Close-ups of watches syncing. Final shot pulls back through window showing team ready. Edgar Wright-style visual comedy timing.

elements.cameraMovement: Quick cuts, overhead shots, dynamic push-ins
elements.subject: Heist team preparing, planning documents, equipment
elements.scene: Warehouse hideout, planning room, various prep locations
elements.motion: Fast-paced editing, objects being placed, plans unfolding
elements.lighting: Dramatic overhead lighting, computer screens glow

modifiedElements.subject: Hackers with multiple screens, digital planning

bestPractices: Match action across cuts for flow
Use visual motifs to connect scenes
Build rhythm with editing pace

templates.title: Emotional Farewell Scene at Train Station
templates.description: Bittersweet goodbye with classic cinematic techniques

prompt.main: Steam from vintage train creates atmospheric haze. Tracking shot follows couple walking along platform, hands intertwined. Cut to close-up of clasped hands slowly separating. Low angle as one boards train, other remains on platform. Through train window, pressing hands against glass. Train begins moving, camera on platform tracks alongside accelerating train. Final wide shot shows solitary figure as train disappears into distance.

elements.cameraMovement: Tracking shots, platform dolly, emotional close-ups
elements.subject: Couple saying goodbye, vintage train departure
elements.motion: Train departure, steam billowing, slow separation
elements.lighting: Shafts of light through station windows, steam atmosphere

bestPractices: Focus on small emotional details
Use steam/atmosphere for mood
Time movement with emotional beats
